prompt: Serialization throws NotSerializableException. What is the bug?
choices: Car cannot extend classes when it implements Serializable
Car holds a reference to Engine which is not Serializable; serializing Car throws NotSerializableException
static fields cannot be held by Serializable classes
Engine must be abstract to be excluded from serialization
explanation: All non-transient, non-static fields must be serializable. Engine doesn't implement Serializable, so serializing Car fails. Fix options: (1) make Engine implement Serializable, (2) mark engine as transient, (3) implement custom writeObject/readObject to handle it manually.
